title: Case→Length→DDM
summary: Demonstrates the Case Richness → Sentence Length → DDM Rank Shift linking mechanism analysis on 50 UD treebanks. Computes Spearman/Pearson correlations with bootstrap CIs, mediation-style OLS regressions, group-level Kruskal-Wallis tests by case richness bins, and a final verdict on whether the linking mechanism is supported. Includes scatter plots and bar chart visualization.
